title: Stanford d.school Design Futures Symposium
description: Annual gathering of design innovators featuring keynotes from IDEO founders and hands-on futures-thinking workshops. Limited public access; guest passes available via concierge.

title: Filoli Estate Dawn Garden Walk
description: Pre-opening guided walk through Filoli's 16-acre formal garden at dawn. Fog burns off to reveal bloom-peak roses and wisteria. One of the Bay Area's most quietly spectacular mornings.

title: Benu x Saison One-Night Collaborative Dinner
description: One-night collaborative tasting menu between three-Michelin-starred Benu and Saison. Twelve courses drawing on Korean, Japanese, and Californian traditions. Concierge can request last-minute cancellation releases.

title: Russian Ridge Trail Run at Sunrise
location: Russian Ridge Open Space Preserve, Portola Valley
description: 6-mile loop with panoramic Bay views and Pacific fog burn-off. Peak wildflower season. Hotel can arrange private trail guide and post-run recovery setup in room.

title: San Jose Museum of Art: 'The Passage of Light' Opening
location: San Jose Museum of Art, San Jose
description: Private opening reception for a new installation by Bay Area light artist James Turrell. Works explore themes of perception, consciousness, and sacred space — ideal for guests with contemplative or spiritual interests.

title: Hakone Estate Japanese Tea Ceremony
description: Intimate chado ceremony conducted by a certified Urasenke tea master in an authentic 1917 Japanese garden. Limited to 8 guests. Gluten-free wagashi available on request.

title: Sand Hill Road Investor Summit — Networking Dinner
description: Annual Sand Hill Road investor dinner — curated seating of 60 VCs and founders. On-property; hotel guests receive priority access. Wine list by award-winning sommelier.

title: Portola Valley Gravel Ride
description: 32-mile guided gravel loop through vineyard country above Silicon Valley. Hotel provides loaner bikes, helmets, and recovery breakfast on return. Suitable for intermediate riders.

title: Madera Restaurant Vegetarian Tasting Menu
description: Chef's seasonal vegetarian progression — California farm-to-table produce, no alcohol required, paired with herbal infusions on request. Private terrace seating available for couples.

title: Cantor Arts Center: 'Visions of Silicon Valley' Exhibition
description: New exhibition examining how Silicon Valley's architecture, objects, and culture have shaped global design aesthetics. Features original artifacts from Apple, IDEO, and Pixar.

title: Rosewood Sand Hill Sunrise Meditation & Yoga
description: Daily guided sunrise meditation and yoga session on the garden terrace. Yoga mats, meditation cushions, and herbal tea provided. Quiet and private; open to in-house guests only.

title: Napa Valley Private Wine Estate Tour
location: Stag's Leap Wine Cellars, Napa Valley
description: Private guided tour and barrel tasting at one of Napa's historic estates, including a winemaker lunch. Hotel arranges car service. Non-wine alternatives available for non-drinkers.
